findings.summary: OUTX motor output falsely classified as UART

incorrect.description: 27-pin net on DRV8323 matched by UART detector. OUTX is a motor phase output, not a UART signal.

suggestions: Exclude high-pin-count nets and motor driver outputs from UART detection

missed.description: 3x R4/R5/R6 with Kelvin connections and anti-alias RC filters feeding DRV8323 integrated CSA. current_sense=[]. 2mOhm shunt resistors not detected.

suggestions: Detect very low value resistors (< 100mOhm) as current sense shunts, especially when connected to CSA/sense amplifier inputs

findings.summary: Three-phase bridge nets all identical (OUTX, GHX, GLX, SPX_Q)

incorrect.description: h_bridge.kicad_sch instantiated 3x but nets not namespaced per instance. All three phases share identical net names OUTX, GHX, GLX, SPX_Q instead of phase-specific names.

suggestions: Namespace nets per hierarchical sheet instance to distinguish phase A/B/C

incorrect.description: DRV8323_SCLK matched as I2C SCL due to substring match. SCLK is an SPI clock signal, not I2C.

suggestions: Use word-boundary matching for SCL to avoid matching SCLK (SPI clock)

findings.summary: CAN_RX/CAN_TX categorized as UART in test_coverage

incorrect.description: CAN_RX/CAN_TX nets matched by UART detector due to RX/TX naming pattern. These are CAN bus signals.

suggestions: Exclude nets with CAN prefix from UART RX/TX pattern matching

findings.summary: SXX_P/SXX_N current sense nets falsely detected as differential pair

incorrect.description: Current sense nets with _P/_N suffix matched as differential pairs. These are single-ended sense lines from shunt resistors, not differential signaling.

suggestions: Verify differential pair candidates are actually used for differential signaling, not just named with _P/_N suffix

incorrect.description: VBAT_SENSE is an ADC sense net but matches VBAT power pattern and is classified as a power rail.

suggestions: Exclude nets with _SENSE/_FB/_ADC suffix from power rail classification

findings.summary: DRV8323 gate driver not characterized (bootstrap caps, CSA)

missed.description: DRV8323 is a three-phase gate driver with bootstrap capacitors and integrated current sense amplifier. Not characterized as a gate driver circuit.

suggestions: Add gate driver detection for DRV83xx family and similar motor driver ICs

findings.summary: CAN 120-ohm termination not linked to CAN bus detection

missed.description: CAN bus 120-ohm termination resistor present but not linked to CAN bus protocol detection.

suggestions: When detecting CAN bus, also identify termination resistors (120 ohm between CANH/CANL)

findings.summary: NTC thermistor not recognized in voltage divider

missed.description: NTC thermistor in voltage divider configuration for temperature sensing not recognized as a thermistor circuit.

suggestions: Detect NTC/PTC thermistors in voltage divider circuits as temperature sensing
